question: 查询身份证号为'420900199001010001'的人员姓名、性别以及所有的社保缴费记录，包括缴费月份、保险类型和缴费基数。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, p.gender, s.pay_month, s.insurance_type, s.pay_base FROM person p JOIN social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card WHERE p.id_card = '420900199001010001' AND s.is_valid = '1';
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.name,
    p.gender,
    sip.pay_month,
    sip.insurance_type,
    sip.pay_base
FROM 
    person p
JOIN 
    social_insurance_payment sip
ON 
    p.id_card = sip.id_card
WHERE 
    p.id_card = '420900199001010001';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.name,
    p.gender,
    sip.pay_month,
    sip.insurance_type,
    sip.pay_base
FROM 
    person p
JOIN 
    social_insurance_payment sip
ON 
    p.id_card = sip.id_card
WHERE 
    p.id_card = '420900199001010001';

question: 查看就业登记中所有有效记录对应的企业名称，列出人员的身份证号、就业形式、合同起止日期和企业名称。
gold_sql: SELECT e.id_card, e.employment_form, e.contract_start_date, e.contract_end_date, c.company_name FROM employment_registration e JOIN company_info c ON e.company_id = c.company_id WHERE e.is_valid = '1';
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  er.id_card,
  er.employment_form,
  er.contract_start_date,
  er.contract_end_date,
  ci.company_name
FROM 
  employment_registration er
JOIN 
  company_info ci ON er.company_id = ci.company_id
WHERE 
  er.is_valid = '1' AND ci.is_valid = '1';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  er.id_card,
  er.employment_form,
  er.contract_start_date,
  er.contract_end_date,
  ci.company_name
FROM 
  employment_registration er
JOIN 
  company_info ci ON er.company_id = ci.company_id
WHERE 
  er.is_valid = '1' AND ci.is_valid = '1';

question: 统计每家有效企业在2025年的社保缴费总人次，显示企业名称和缴费人次，按缴费人次降序排列，取前10名。
gold_sql: SELECT c.company_name, COUNT(s.payment_id) AS payment_count FROM social_insurance_payment s JOIN company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id WHERE s.is_valid = '1' AND c.is_valid = '1' AND s.pay_month BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512' GROUP BY c.company_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC LIMIT 10;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_name,
  COUNT(s.payment_id) AS payment_count
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.pay_month LIKE '2025%' 
  AND s.is_valid = '1' 
  AND c.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_name
ORDER BY 
  payment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_name,
  COUNT(s.payment_id) AS payment_count
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.pay_month LIKE '2025%' 
  AND s.is_valid = '1' 
  AND c.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_name
ORDER BY 
  payment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: 查询身份证号为'420900199001010001'的人员是否被认定为困难人员，如果有，列出困难类别、认定机构和当前是否有效。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, h.hardship_category, h.certify_org, h.is_valid FROM person p LEFT JOIN hardship_certification h ON p.id_card = h.id_card WHERE p.id_card = '420900199001010001';
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.id_card,
  p.name,
  hc.hardship_category,
  hc.certify_org,
  CASE 
    WHEN hc.cancel_date IS NULL THEN '有效'
    ELSE '无效'
  END AS is_valid
FROM 
  person p
LEFT JOIN 
  hardship_certification hc ON p.id_card = hc.id_card
WHERE 
  p.id_card = '420900199001010001';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.id_card,
  p.name,
  hc.hardship_category,
  hc.certify_org,
  CASE 
    WHEN hc.cancel_date IS NULL THEN '有效'
    ELSE '无效'
  END AS is_valid
FROM 
  person p
LEFT JOIN 
  hardship_certification hc ON p.id_card = hc.id_card
WHERE 
  p.id_card = '420900199001010001';

question: 检查已领取过补贴的人员中，哪些人还在失业登记有效期内，列出姓名、身份证号、失业日期和补贴金额。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, u.id_card, u.unemployment_date, s.grant_amount FROM person p JOIN unemployment_registration u ON p.id_card = u.id_card JOIN subsidy_payment_history s ON p.id_card = s.id_card WHERE u.is_valid = '1' AND s.is_valid = '1';
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.id_card, 
  u.unemployment_date, 
  s.grant_amount
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  unemployment_registration u ON p.id_card = u.id_card
JOIN 
  subsidy_payment_history s ON p.id_card = s.id_card
WHERE 
  u.is_valid = '1' 
  AND s.is_valid = '1' 
  AND (u.cancel_date IS NULL OR u.cancel_date > CURDATE());
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.id_card, 
  u.unemployment_date, 
  s.grant_amount
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  unemployment_registration u ON p.id_card = u.id_card
JOIN 
  subsidy_payment_history s ON p.id_card = s.id_card
WHERE 
  u.is_valid = '1' 
  AND s.is_valid = '1' 
  AND (u.cancel_date IS NULL OR u.cancel_date > CURDATE());

question: 查询在'COMP101'企业就业且已缴纳社保的人员名单，列出姓名、身份证号、就业形式和社保缴费基数，按缴费月份从近到远排序。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, e.id_card, e.employment_form, s.pay_base FROM person p JOIN employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card JOIN social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card AND e.company_id = s.company_id WHERE e.company_id = 'COMP101' AND e.is_valid = '1' AND s.is_valid = '1' ORDER BY s.pay_month DESC;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.id_card, 
  e.employment_form, 
  s.pay_base
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card AND e.company_id = 'COMP101'
JOIN 
  social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card AND s.company_id = 'COMP101'
WHERE 
  e.is_valid = '1' 
  AND s.is_valid = '1'
ORDER BY 
  s.pay_month DESC;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.id_card, 
  e.employment_form, 
  s.pay_base
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card AND e.company_id = 'COMP101'
JOIN 
  social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card AND s.company_id = 'COMP101'
WHERE 
  e.is_valid = '1' 
  AND s.is_valid = '1'
ORDER BY 
  s.pay_month DESC;

question: 统计政策编码为'POLICY_001'的补贴发放总金额和领取人数。
gold_sql: SELECT s.policy_code, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id_card) AS recipient_count, SUM(s.grant_amount) AS total_amount FROM subsidy_payment_history s JOIN person p ON s.id_card = p.id_card WHERE s.policy_code = 'POLICY_001' AND s.is_valid = '1' GROUP BY s.policy_code;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(sph.grant_amount) AS total_grant_amount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sph.id_card) AS total_recipients
FROM 
  subsidy_payment_history sph
WHERE 
  sph.policy_code = 'POLICY_001'
  AND sph.is_valid = '1';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(sph.grant_amount) AS total_grant_amount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sph.id_card) AS total_recipients
FROM 
  subsidy_payment_history sph
WHERE 
  sph.policy_code = 'POLICY_001';

question: 查看身份证号为'420900199001010001'的人员所有有效补贴发放记录，以及每次补贴对应的政策编码和享受月份起止。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, s.policy_code, s.apply_start_month, s.apply_end_month, s.first_enjoy_month, s.grant_months, s.grant_amount FROM person p JOIN subsidy_payment_history s ON p.id_card = s.id_card WHERE p.id_card = '420900199001010001' AND s.is_valid = '1' ORDER BY s.grant_date;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  sph.payment_id,
  sph.id_card,
  p.name,
  sph.policy_code,
  sph.apply_start_month,
  sph.apply_end_month,
  sph.first_enjoy_month,
  sph.grant_months,
  sph.grant_amount,
  sph.grant_date
FROM 
  subsidy_payment_history sph
JOIN 
  person p ON sph.id_card = p.id_card
WHERE 
  sph.id_card = '420900199001010001'
  AND sph.is_valid = '1'
ORDER BY 
  sph.grant_date;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  sph.payment_id,
  sph.id_card,
  p.name,
  sph.policy_code,
  sph.apply_start_month,
  sph.apply_end_month,
  sph.first_enjoy_month,
  sph.grant_months,
  sph.grant_amount,
  sph.grant_date
FROM 
  subsidy_payment_history sph
JOIN 
  person p ON sph.id_card = p.id_card
WHERE 
  sph.id_card = '420900199001010001'
  AND sph.is_valid = '1'
ORDER BY 
  sph.grant_date;

question: 找出所有困难人员认定有效，并且有社保缴费记录的人员，列出姓名、困难类别、社保缴费月份和缴费基数。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, h.hardship_category, s.pay_month, s.pay_base FROM person p JOIN hardship_certification h ON p.id_card = h.id_card AND h.is_valid = '1' JOIN social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card AND s.is_valid = '1' ORDER BY s.pay_month DESC;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name,
  hc.hardship_category,
  sip.pay_month,
  sip.pay_base
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  hardship_certification hc ON p.id_card = hc.id_card AND hc.is_valid = '1'
JOIN 
  social_insurance_payment sip ON p.id_card = sip.id_card AND sip.is_valid = '1'
WHERE 
  hc.cancel_date IS NULL;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name,
  hc.hardship_category,
  sip.pay_month,
  sip.pay_base
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  hardship_certification hc ON p.id_card = hc.id_card AND hc.is_valid = '1' AND hc.cancel_date IS NULL
JOIN 
  social_insurance_payment sip ON p.id_card = sip.id_card AND sip.is_valid = '1';

question: 查询每家企业为其员工缴纳社保的平均缴费基数，显示企业名称和平均缴费基数，只显示平均基数大于5000的企业。
gold_sql: SELECT c.company_name, AVG(s.pay_base) AS avg_pay_base FROM social_insurance_payment s JOIN company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id WHERE s.is_valid = '1' AND c.is_valid = '1' GROUP BY c.company_name HAVING AVG(s.pay_base) > 5000;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.company_name,
    AVG(s.pay_base) AS avg_pay_base
FROM 
    social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
    company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
    s.is_valid = '1' AND c.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
    c.company_id, c.company_name
HAVING 
    AVG(s.pay_base) > 5000;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.company_name,
    AVG(s.pay_base) AS avg_pay_base
FROM 
    social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
    company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
    s.is_valid = '1' AND c.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
    c.company_id, c.company_name
HAVING 
    AVG(s.pay_base) > 5000;

question: 查询身份证号为'420900199001010001'的人员，在公司编号为'COMP101'的企业，社保缴费的最高和最低缴费基数。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, MAX(s.pay_base) AS max_pay_base, MIN(s.pay_base) AS min_pay_base FROM person p JOIN social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card WHERE p.id_card = '420900199001010001' AND s.company_id = 'COMP101' AND s.is_valid = '1' GROUP BY p.name;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  MAX(sip.pay_base) AS max_pay_base,
  MIN(sip.pay_base) AS min_pay_base
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment sip
JOIN 
  person p ON sip.id_card = p.id_card
WHERE 
  sip.id_card = '420900199001010001'
  AND sip.company_id = 'COMP101';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  MAX(sip.pay_base) AS max_pay_base,
  MIN(sip.pay_base) AS min_pay_base
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment sip
WHERE 
  sip.id_card = '420900199001010001'
  AND sip.company_id = 'COMP101';

question: 查询同时存在就业登记和失业登记记录的人员，列出身份证号、姓名、就业企业名称和失业日期。
gold_sql: SELECT p.id_card, p.name, c.company_name, u.unemployment_date FROM person p JOIN employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card AND e.is_valid = '1' JOIN unemployment_registration u ON p.id_card = u.id_card AND u.is_valid = '1' LEFT JOIN company_info c ON e.company_id = c.company_id;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.id_card, 
    p.name, 
    c.company_name AS employment_company_name, 
    u.unemployment_date
FROM 
    person p
JOIN 
    employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card
JOIN 
    company_info c ON e.company_id = c.company_id
JOIN 
    unemployment_registration u ON p.id_card = u.id_card
WHERE 
    e.is_valid = '1' AND 
    u.is_valid = '1';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.id_card, 
    p.name, 
    c.company_name, 
    u.unemployment_date
FROM 
    person p
JOIN 
    employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card
JOIN 
    company_info c ON e.company_id = c.company_id
JOIN 
    unemployment_registration u ON p.id_card = u.id_card
WHERE 
    e.is_valid = '1' AND 
    u.is_valid = '1';

question: 统计困难认定类别为'低保'且当前认定有效的人员中，有多少人已享受过补贴，以及补贴总额。

ON

WHERE 
  hc.hardship_category = '低保'
  AND hc.is_valid = '1'
  AND sph.is_valid = '1';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT sph.id_card) AS person_count,

  hardship_certification hc

  subsidy_payment_history sph

  er.id_card = sip.id_card

question: 查询法律实体身份证号为'420900199001010001'的企业名下，所有在职员工的社保缴费记录，显示企业名称、员工姓名、缴费月份和缴费基数。
gold_sql: SELECT c.company_name, p.name, s.pay_month, s.pay_base FROM company_info c JOIN employment_registration e ON c.company_id = e.company_id AND e.is_valid = '1' JOIN person p ON e.id_card = p.id_card JOIN social_insurance_payment s ON p.id_card = s.id_card WHERE c.legal_person_id_card = '420900199001010001' AND c.is_valid = '1' AND s.is_valid = '1' ORDER BY s.pay_month DESC;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_name,
  p.name AS employee_name,
  sip.pay_month,
  sip.pay_base
FROM 
  company_info c
JOIN 
  employment_registration er ON c.company_id = er.company_id
JOIN 
  person p ON er.id_card = p.id_card
JOIN 
  social_insurance_payment sip ON er.id_card = sip.id_card AND er.company_id = sip.company_id
WHERE 
  c.legal_person_id_card = '420900199001010001'
  AND er.is_valid = '1'
  AND sip.is_valid = '1';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_name,
  p.name AS employee_name,
  sip.pay_month,
  sip.pay_base
FROM 
  company_info c
JOIN 
  employment_registration er ON c.company_id = er.company_id
JOIN 
  person p ON er.id_card = p.id_card
JOIN 
  social_insurance_payment sip ON er.id_card = sip.id_card AND er.company_id = sip.company_id
WHERE 
  c.legal_person_id_card = '420900199001010001'
  AND er.is_valid = '1'
  AND sip.is_valid = '1';

question: 查询在'COMP101'企业就业，人员状态正常且合同开始日期在2023年之后的人员中，哪些人没有困难人员认定记录，显示姓名和身份证号。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, p.id_card FROM person p JOIN employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card LEFT JOIN hardship_certification h ON p.id_card = h.id_card AND h.is_valid = '1' WHERE e.company_id = 'COMP101' AND p.system_status = '1' AND e.contract_start_date > '2023-01-01' AND e.is_valid = '1' AND h.cert_id IS NULL;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.id_card
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  employment_registration er ON p.id_card = er.id_card
LEFT JOIN 
  hardship_certification hc ON p.id_card = hc.id_card AND hc.is_valid = '1'
WHERE 
  er.company_id = 'COMP101' 
  AND er.contract_start_date >= '2023-01-01'
  AND er.is_valid = '1'
  AND p.system_status = '1'
  AND hc.cert_id IS NULL;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.id_card
FROM 
  person p
JOIN 
  employment_registration er ON p.id_card = er.id_card
LEFT JOIN 
  hardship_certification hc ON p.id_card = hc.id_card AND hc.is_valid = '1'
WHERE 
  er.company_id = 'COMP101' 
  AND er.contract_start_date >= '2023-01-01'
  AND er.is_valid = '1'
  AND p.system_status = '1'
  AND hc.cert_id IS NULL;

question: 统计每种失业原因下，已领取过补贴的人数，按人数降序排列，只显示人数超过5的失业原因。
gold_sql: SELECT u.unemployment_reason, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id_card) AS recipient_count FROM unemployment_registration u JOIN subsidy_payment_history s ON u.id_card = s.id_card WHERE u.is_valid = '1' AND s.is_valid = '1' GROUP BY u.unemployment_reason HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.id_card) > 5 ORDER BY recipient_count DESC;
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  ur.unemployment_reason,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sph.id_card) AS subsidy_recipients_count
FROM 
  unemployment_registration ur
JOIN 
  subsidy_payment_history sph 
ON 
  ur.id_card = sph.id_card
WHERE 
  ur.is_valid = '1' AND sph.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  ur.unemployment_reason
HAVING 
  subsidy_recipients_count > 5
ORDER BY 
  subsidy_recipients_count DESC;
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  ur.unemployment_reason,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sph.id_card) AS subsidy_recipients_count
FROM 
  unemployment_registration ur
JOIN 
  subsidy_payment_history sph 
ON 
  ur.id_card = sph.id_card
WHERE 
  ur.is_valid = '1' AND sph.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  ur.unemployment_reason
HAVING 
  subsidy_recipients_count > 5
ORDER BY 
  subsidy_recipients_count DESC;

question: 查询政策编码为'POLICY_001'的补贴发放记录中，每位领取人员的姓名、身份证号、领取金额和领取日期，以及该人员当前是否在就业登记有效状态。
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, s.id_card, s.grant_amount, s.grant_date, CASE WHEN e.record_id IS NOT NULL THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS is_employed FROM person p JOIN subsidy_payment_history s ON p.id_card = s.id_card LEFT JOIN employment_registration e ON p.id_card = e.id_card AND e.is_valid = '1' WHERE s.policy_code = 'POLICY_001' AND s.is_valid = '1';
first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.name,
    p.id_card,
    sph.grant_amount,
    sph.grant_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN er.is_valid = '1' AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN er.employment_date AND COALESCE(er.contract_end_date, '9999-12-31') THEN '是'
        ELSE '否'
    END AS is_employed
FROM 
    subsidy_payment_history sph
JOIN 
    person p ON sph.id_card = p.id_card
LEFT JOIN 
    employment_registration er ON sph.id_card = er.id_card
WHERE 
    sph.policy_code = 'POLICY_001';
final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.name,
    p.id_card,
    sph.grant_amount,
    sph.grant_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN er.is_valid = '1' AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN er.employment_date AND COALESCE(er.contract_end_date, '9999-12-31') THEN '是'
        ELSE '否'
    END AS is_employed
FROM 
    subsidy_payment_history sph
JOIN 
    person p ON sph.id_card = p.id_card
LEFT JOIN 
    employment_registration er ON sph.id_card = er.id_card
WHERE 
    sph.policy_code = 'POLICY_001';
